name: mbelib-neo
description: C library for IMBE/AMBE vocoder frame handling, error correction, synthesis, packaging, tests, and developer tooling.
build_common_tools_justification: Build uses common tools: CMake, a C compiler, CTest, and standard platform toolchains.
build_floss_tools_justification: Build and test tools are FLOSS.
contribution_justification: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/arancormonk/mbelib-neo/main/CONTRIBUTING.md documents the pull request contribution process.
contribution_requirements_justification: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/arancormonk/mbelib-neo/main/CONTRIBUTING.md lists DCO, coding, testing, licensing, and review requirements.
crypto_call_justification: The library runtime does not implement cryptographic protocols, password storage, TLS, credential storage, or cryptographic key generation; see docs/security-requirements.md.
crypto_floss_justification: The library runtime does not implement cryptographic protocols, password storage, TLS, credential storage, or cryptographic key generation; see docs/security-requirements.md.
crypto_keylength_justification: The library runtime does not implement cryptographic protocols, password storage, TLS, credential storage, or cryptographic key generation; see docs/security-requirements.md.
crypto_password_storage_justification: The library runtime does not implement cryptographic protocols, password storage, TLS, credential storage, or cryptographic key generation; see docs/security-requirements.md.
crypto_pfs_justification: The library runtime does not implement cryptographic protocols, password storage, TLS, credential storage, or cryptographic key generation; see docs/security-requirements.md.
crypto_published_justification: The library runtime does not implement cryptographic protocols, password storage, TLS, credential storage, or cryptographic key generation; see docs/security-requirements.md.
crypto_random_justification: The library runtime does not implement cryptographic protocols, password storage, TLS, credential storage, or cryptographic key generation; see docs/security-requirements.md.
crypto_weaknesses_justification: The library runtime does not implement cryptographic protocols, password storage, TLS, credential storage, or cryptographic key generation; see docs/security-requirements.md.
crypto_working_justification: The library runtime does not implement cryptographic protocols, password storage, TLS, credential storage, or cryptographic key generation; see docs/security-requirements.md.
delivery_mitm_justification: Repository, release downloads, and documentation are distributed over GitHub HTTPS.
delivery_unsigned_justification: Release checksums are distributed over HTTPS and release verification docs require signature verification when detached signatures are present.
description_good_justification: https://github.com/arancormonk/mbelib-neo and README describe the C library scope and supported codec primitives.
discussion_justification: GitHub Issues and pull requests at https://github.com/arancormonk/mbelib-neo/issues and https://github.com/arancormonk/mbelib-neo/pulls are searchable and URL-addressable.
documentation_basics_justification: https://github.com/arancormonk/mbelib-neo README links build, install, test, security, architecture, support, and contribution docs.
documentation_interface_justification: Public API is documented in https://raw.githubusercontent.com/arancormonk/mbelib-neo/main/include/mbelib-neo/mbelib.h and docs/architecture.md.
dynamic_analysis_enable_assertions_justi: Debug/test builds keep assertions and sanitizer checks enabled.
dynamic_analysis_justification: Sanitizer CI and ClusterFuzzLite PR fuzzing run on relevant changes.
dynamic_analysis_unsafe_justification: C code is exercised with AddressSanitizer/UndefinedBehaviorSanitizer and ClusterFuzzLite.
english_justification: Project documentation and issue discussion are maintained in English.
enhancement_responses_justification: Enhancement requests are tracked and responded to through GitHub Issues and pull requests.
floss_license_osi_justification: GPL-2.0-or-later is an OSI-approved FLOSS license.
interact_justification: README links releases, issues, support, and contribution docs at https://github.com/arancormonk/mbelib-neo.
know_common_errors_justification: CI uses C-focused analyzers, sanitizers, fuzzing, CodeQL, Semgrep, cppcheck, scan-build, and GCC fanalyzer for common weakness classes.
know_secure_design_justification: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/arancormonk/mbelib-neo/main/docs/security-requirements.md documents threat model, trust boundaries, secure design controls, and assurance case.
license_location_justification: License is in https://raw.githubusercontent.com/arancormonk/mbelib-neo/main/LICENSE and SPDX headers are used in source files.
maintained_justification: Project has recent commits, releases, CI, dependency updates, and merged PR https://github.com/arancormonk/mbelib-neo/pull/20.
no_leaked_credentials_justification: Gitleaks and GitHub secret scanning are enabled in guardrail checks.
release_notes_justification: GitHub Releases provide human-readable release notes at https://github.com/arancormonk/mbelib-neo/releases.
release_notes_vulns_justification: No publicly known runtime vulnerabilities with CVE assignments were fixed in the latest release.
repo_distributed_justification: Git is a distributed version control system.
repo_interim_justification: The default branch exposes interim development versions between releases.
repo_track_justification: GitHub git history tracks changes, authors, and timestamps.
report_archive_justification: GitHub Issues and pull requests provide archived public history: https://github.com/arancormonk/mbelib-neo/issues.
report_responses_justification: Issue reporting policy sets acknowledgement, triage, and response expectations.
sites_https_justification: Official repo, issue tracker, release, and documentation URLs are GitHub HTTPS URLs.
static_analysis_common_vulnerabilities_j: CodeQL and Semgrep include common vulnerability rules for C/C++ and workflows.
static_analysis_justification: CI runs CodeQL, Semgrep, clang-tidy, cppcheck, scan-build, GCC fanalyzer, and IWYU/pre-push checks.
static_analysis_often_justification: Static analysis runs in GitHub Actions on pull requests and pushes.
test_continuous_integration_justificatio: GitHub Actions run tests and quality gates on PRs and pushes: https://github.com/arancormonk/mbelib-neo/actions.
test_invocation_justification: Run cmake --preset dev-debug, cmake --build --preset dev-debug -j, and ctest --preset dev-debug --output-on-failure.
test_justification: CTest suite and invocation are documented in https://raw.githubusercontent.com/arancormonk/mbelib-neo/main/docs/testing.md.
test_most_justification: Filtered lcov after PR #20 reports 84.3% line coverage of project-owned source.
test_policy_justification: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/arancormonk/mbelib-neo/main/docs/testing.md and CONTRIBUTING.md require tests for major new functionality.
tests_are_added_justification: Recent coverage work added tests/test_frame_paths.c in PR #20.
tests_documented_added_justification: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/arancormonk/mbelib-neo/main/CONTRIBUTING.md documents test requirements for change proposals.
version_semver_justification: Release tags use SemVer-style vX.Y.Z identifiers.
version_unique_justification: Releases use unique vX.Y.Z tags at https://github.com/arancormonk/mbelib-neo/releases.
vulnerabilities_critical_fixed_justifica: SECURITY.md requires rapid handling of critical vulnerabilities; none are currently known open.
vulnerabilities_fixed_60_days_justificat: No publicly known unpatched medium-or-higher vulnerabilities are currently known for this project.
vulnerability_report_private_justificati: SECURITY.md documents private vulnerability reporting via GitHub Security Advisories: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/arancormonk/mbelib-neo/main/SECURITY.md. Private reports are submitted at https://github.com/arancormonk/mbelib-neo/security/advisories/new.
vulnerability_report_response_justificat: No vulnerability reports are known in the last six months; SECURITY.md documents response expectations.
warnings_fixed_justification: Required CI and pre-push checks passed on PR #20 with warnings treated as errors where configured.
warnings_justification: CI and hooks run compiler warnings, warnings-as-errors, clang-tidy, cppcheck, scan-build, and GCC fanalyzer.
warnings_strict_justification: Guardrails include warnings-as-errors, strict clang-tidy, and static-analysis gates.
